inputs.label: Steam Mass Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: The mass of steam flowing through the pipe per hour. Used to determine the required pipe size and velocity.

inputs.label: Pipe Inner Diameter
inputs.businessContext: The internal diameter of the steam pipe. Critical for cross-sectional area calculation.

inputs.label: Steam Pressure (absolute)
inputs.businessContext: Absolute pressure of the steam. Required to calculate steam density via ideal gas law.

inputs.label: Steam Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of the steam in degrees Celsius. Used with pressure to compute density.
